name: sr_winback_plan_delegation
notes: Sales-Recovery delegation base case (VT-594/595 both Done): a seeded lapsed cohort + an explicit win-back plan ask should DELEGATE to the Sales-Recovery specialist and surface an in-chat plan summary + approval ask, never the D1 'I'm on it' non-answer, never silence. Run: `setup --onboarded --seed-lapsed-customers 7 --name convo-harness-<id>` then `script <tenant> sr_winback_plan_delegation.json`. Step 2 confirms the pure customer-count ask still fast-paths to the raw number regardless of what step 1 produced.

steps.message: business has been a bit slow lately — can you put together a win-back plan for the customers who haven't ordered in a while?
assert_not_contains: got it — i'm on it and i'll update you shortly
i'm on it and i'll update you
steps.note: Expect real delegation to Sales-Recovery: a substantive plan summary + approval ask grounded in the seeded cohort — never the generic D1 'on it' filler, never silence.

steps.message: how many customers do I have on file?
steps.note: Pure count ask fast-paths via status_query regardless of the win-back plan outcome above.
